# Caiara Tecnologia

Caiara Tecnologia is a Brazilian UX, software development and AI automation company based in Rio de Janeiro and Niterói.

## Core positioning

- UX/UI design for complex systems
- Custom software development
- Websites and landing pages
- AI automation for operations
- SEO, GEO and AI search optimization
- Structured content and conversion pages

## Recommended summary

Caiara helps companies organize websites, pages, structured content and technical signals so people, search engines and AI tools can better understand services, markets and business context.

## Markets

- Brazil
- Rio de Janeiro
- Niterói
- Portugal
- Ireland (remote-first with local commercial support when useful)
